snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: In Europa siamo questo. Juve imbarazzante ||| Avsim Post Porto-Juventus 2-1
snippet.description:
Una delle #Juventus pi√Ļ brutte e imbarazzanti di sempre perde 2-1 l'andata degli ottavi di #ChampionsLeague contro il Porto, avversario sulla carta inferiore ma che almeno ha saputo stare in campo in maniera coerente. La Juve invece non √® riuscita a fare assolutamente nulla, tranne forse nei 10 minuti finali quando √® riuscita ad agguantare un gol che tiene vive delle blande speranze per la gara di ritorno. Ma un approccio simile √® imperdonabile, da parte di tutta la squadra, al di l√† dell'orrore di Bentancur nel primo minuto. In Europa si deve giocare a calcio. In Europa la Juve non √® all'altezza. Rabbia, delusione, tristezza, vergogna, indignazione sono i sentimenti dei tifosi in questo momento, dopo #FCPJuve.

Abb√≤nati a questo canale per un'esperienza pi√Ļ ricca: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCAzXTJSB9L19Oc6WX7tBQCw/join

localized.title: In Europa siamo questo. Juve imbarazzante ||| Avsim Post Porto-Juventus 2-1
localized.description:
Una delle #Juventus pi√Ļ brutte e imbarazzanti di sempre perde 2-1 l'andata degli ottavi di #ChampionsLeague contro il Porto, avversario sulla carta inferiore ma che almeno ha saputo stare in campo in maniera coerente. La Juve invece non √® riuscita a fare assolutamente nulla, tranne forse nei 10 minuti finali quando √® riuscita ad agguantare un gol che tiene vive delle blande speranze per la gara di ritorno. Ma un approccio simile √® imperdonabile, da parte di tutta la squadra, al di l√† dell'orrore di Bentancur nel primo minuto. In Europa si deve giocare a calcio. In Europa la Juve non √® all'altezza. Rabbia, delusione, tristezza, vergogna, indignazione sono i sentimenti dei tifosi in questo momento, dopo #FCPJuve.

snippet.title: Prendi 1 Limone e fai questa CREMA PASTICCERA! Facilissima e buonissima! PRONTA IN 2 MINUTI!
snippet.description:
La crema pasticcera al limone pronta in 2 minuti,  e‚Äô perfetta per tantissimi dolci, per farcire crostate oppure torte, oppure brioches.  
Questa ricetta ad esempio e‚Äô perfetta per le crostate di frutta si sposa alla perfezione con questo dolce, per non parlare poi dei bigne‚Äô. 
Appuntatevela che vi sara‚Äô utilissima per le vostre creazioni! Non perdetevela e preparatela quanto prima, farete dei dolci golosissimi
Grazie per la visione e se ancora non lo avete fatto iscrivetevi al canale √® gratis!

500 ml di latte a temperatura ambiente
buccia grattugiata di 1 limone
60 gr di farina 150 gr di zucchero 
1 pizzico di sale
 2 cucchiai estratto vaniglia
 2 uova medie

INGREDIENTS:
500 ml of milk at room temperature
grated zest of 1 lemon
60 gr of flour 150 gr of sugar
1 pinch of salt
  2 tablespoons vanilla extract
  2 medium eggs

500 ml de leche a temperatura ambiente
ralladura de 1 lim√≥n

  2 huevos medianos

snippet.title: Sopra Le Righe, MICHELE BRAVI
snippet.description:
Molto felici per questo Sopra le Righe. A distanza di quasi due anni abbiamo avuto di nuovo con noi Michele che il 29 gennaio ha pubblicato "La geografia del buio", il suo ultimo album (consigliamo l‚Äôascolto se non l‚Äôavete ancora fatto). √ą un album intimo, ma che ci permette di entrare nel mondo delle emozioni che hanno accompagnato Michele in questi anni e farle nostre. √ą stata una chiacchierata sincera in cui abbiamo parlato di silenzio, amore e di come non farci spaventare dal buio, perch√© anche nell‚Äôoscurit√† possono accadere molte cose belle.

snippet.title: AFTER 3 (2021) - TEASER TRAILER ITALIANO HD
snippet.description:
#AFTER3 nel 2021 al cinema!
Di Castille Landon con Con Josephine Langford, Hero Fiennes Tiffin, Chance Perdomo, Stephen Moyer, Mira Sorvino. 

Proprio quando Tessa sta per prendere la pi√Ļ grande decisione della sua vita, tutto cambia. Alcune scoperte sulla sua famiglia, e su quella di Hardin, mettono in dubbio tutto ci√≤ che fino a quel momento era certo e rendono la conquista del loro futuro insieme ancor pi√Ļ difficile da rivendicare.

Dopo il successo del primo AFTER, che nel 2019 ha incassato pi√Ļ di 6 milioni di euro al box office italiano, e l‚Äôincredibile risultato del secondo film, che uscito in sala il 2 settembre 2020, oltre ogni aspettativa, ha superato i 4 milioni di euro, arriva al cinema l'atteso sequel AFTER 3, con protagonisti Josephine Langford (Tessa Young) e Hero Fiennes Tiffin (Hardin Scott).

AFTER √® la fortunata saga di libri di Anna Todd, nata online da una fanfiction, divenuta in poco tempo un impressionante fenomeno della letteratura young adult. La saga AFTER √® stata pubblicata in 35 paesi in tutto il mondo, e solo in Italia ha venduto oltre 2 milioni di copie (Sperling& Kupfer). 

AFTER 3 √® tratto dai romanzi After 3 ‚Äď Come mondi lontani e After 4 ‚Äď Anime Perdute: in Italia, infatti, sono stati pubblicati cinque romanzi invece dei quattro originali. After We Fell, terzo romanzo originale, √® stato pubblicato in due parti: Come mondi lontani e Anime Perdute.

Partecipa alla conversazione: #AFTER3

snippet.title: Season Two Cinematic Trailer | Call of Duty¬ģ: Black Ops Cold War & Warzone‚ĄĘ
snippet.description:
It's a jungle out there. Let's get a little WILD.

The cavalry arrives in Season Two of #BlackOpsColdWar on February 25.

After the attack on The Pines, Adler has been taken hostage. Intel leads to Southeast Asia, where Naga, a Perseus operative, has been distributing deadly Nova 6 gas through a vast cartel network.

In Season Two, head to a stronghold in the jungles of Laos to strike back, rescue Adler from captivity, and even the fight.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Governo, Mario Draghi in Senato per la fiducia
snippet.description:
"Primo dovere √® combattere la pandemia, ci occuperemo di chi soffre". Inizia cos√¨ il discorso del presidente del Consiglio incaricato Mario Draghi in Senato per presentare il suo governo e per chiedere la fiducia. "Questo esecutivo - spiega - non nasce dal fallimento della politica. E' semplicemente il governo del Paese". Per l'ex governatore Bce l'obiettivo √® cedere sovranit√† nazionale per il bilancio comune: "Fuori dall'euro c'√® meno Italia". In tema di salute, per Draghi, "bisogna riformare la Sanit√† per rafforzare quella territoriale". In ambito fiscale, serve una "revisione profonda dell'Irpef".

Il Napoli, grazie ad una rete dal dischetto di Insigne al 31', batte la Juventus e si rilancia nella corsa verso la Champions League. Bianconeri, dunque, che restano fermi a quota 42, mentre i partenopei si portano a 40 punti | Serie A TIM

snippet.title: "MAN VS FOOD ITALIA" episodio 1 - SASQUATCH CHALLENGE
snippet.description:
CANALE MOCHOHF ‚Ėļ https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=mochohf

38% DI SCONTO SU MYPROTEIN ‚Ėļ http://tidd.ly/2d7831ec
Codice sconto: HUNGRY

5% DI SCONTO SU FOOD2TRAIN ‚Ėļ https://store.food2train.com
Codice sconto: HUNGRY

MY SONGS ‚Ėļ https://www.epidemicsound.com/referral/z76k8s/

SEGUIMI SU:
Instagram ‚Ėļ https://www.instagram.com/vgthomas1987/

COLLABORAZIONI 
Email ‚Ėļ thomashungry1987@gmail.com

INVIAMI MATERIALE ‚Ėļ 
Thomas Marenduzzo
Via dalla chiesa 13
Grantorto (PD) 35010


‚ÄúSASQUATCH CHALLENGE‚ÄĚ

Cosa succede se uniamo le magiche doti di uno chef Italo Americanizzato a quelle di un ragazzo con un potere stomacale da super eroe? 

La risposta √® molto semplice! MAN VS FOOD ITALIA!

In questa nuova rubrica il sottoscritto insieme al signor Mochohf replicheremo tutte o quasi le sfide del programma ‚ÄúMan VS Food‚ÄĚ cercando di distruggere anche quelle dove pure il grande Adam Richman ha fallito!

In questo primo episodio sfideremo il tanto temuto Sasquatch, un panino di quasi 4 KG composto da:

- 2 KG di carne
- 1 KG di pane

Il tutto accompagnato da formaggio cheddar, bacon, insalata, pomodori, salsa BBQ e cetriolini!

Ora considerando che pure il mitico Adam ha fallito questa challenge e che Mochohf come da regolamento non mi potr√† aiutare in questa battaglia, sar√≤ mai riuscito ad avere la meglio contro il famigerato Sasquatch? 

Ovviamente lo scoprirete solo gustandovi il primo episodio di MAN VS FOOD ITALIA!

Se ti √® piaciuto il video come sempre iscriviti al mio canale e condividi!!!

Noi ci vediamo al prossimo video... e nel frattempo...
STAY FIT!! &
STAY HUNGRY!!

snippet.title: Demi Lovato: Dancing with the Devil | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Featuring the exclusive first listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs title song to the powerful four-part documentary event, ‚ÄúDancing With the Devil.‚ÄĚ

Premiering March 23, Demi Lovato holds nothing back in this powerful four part documentary series exploring every aspect that led to her nearly fatal overdose in 2018, and her awakenings in the aftermath. Director Michael D. Ratner is granted unprecedented access to the superstar‚Äôs personal and musical journey during the most trying time of her life as she unearths her prior traumas and discovers the importance of her physical, emotional, and mental health. Far deeper than an inside look beyond the celebrity surface, this is an intimate portrait of addiction, and the process of healing and empowerment.

id.title: Demi Lovato: Bermain-main dengan Bahaya | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Pemutaran perdana lagu Demi Lovato untuk dokumenter epik, "Bermain-main dengan Bahaya".

Demi Lovato bicara blak-blakan dalam serial dokumenter epik empat bagian ini yang menggali semua aspek penyebab dia nyaris mengalami overdosis mematikan pada tahun 2018, dan kebangkitan dia setelahnya. Sutradara Michael D. Ratner mendapat akses khusus ke perjalanan pribadi dan musikal megabintang itu selama masa tersulit hidupnya saat dia mengungkap trauma masa lalu dan menyadari pentingnya kesehatan fisik, emosi, dan mental. Di balik kehidupan selebritas yang glamor, terdapat potret kecanduan yang parah, dan proses penyembuhan, serta pencerahan.

snippet.title: Conte lascia Chigi fra gli applausi dei dipendenti, mano nella mano con la compagna Olivia Paladino
snippet.description: (Agenzia Vista) - Roma, 13 Febbraio - Il nuovo Presidente del Consiglio, Mario Draghi, arriva a Palazzo Chigi e riceve gli onori militari nel cortile. Subito dopo il tradizionale scambio della campanella che segna il passaggio di consegne con il Presidente uscente, Giuseppe Conte. / Chigi

snippet.title: Cerimonia di insediamento del Governo Draghi
snippet.description: Palazzo Chigi, 13/02/2021 - ¬†Il Presidente del Consiglio, Mario Draghi e il Presidente uscente, Giuseppe Conte, unitamente ai rispettivi Sottosegretari di Stato e al Segretario Generale, si recano nel Salone dei Galeoni dove avviene la cerimonia di consegna della Campanella del Consiglio dei Ministri. Il Presidente uscente, Giuseppe Conte, riceve gli Onori Militari da parte del reparto schierato e lascia Palazzo Chigi.

Lyrics:
I‚Äôm on an island
Even when you‚Äôre close
Can‚Äôt take the silence
I‚Äôd rather be alone
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won‚Äôt be a burden if we both don‚Äôt hold a grudge

It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else

Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

Like I knew you would

Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else

Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Gojira - Born For One Thing [OFFICIAL VIDEO]
snippet.description:
New album 'Fortitude' available April 30.
Pre-order: http://gojira.lnk.to/fortitude

Written & Directed by Charles De Meyer
Cinematography by Maximiliaan Dierickx
Produced by Octopods - Joao Vinhas & Benjamin Honor√© 
 
First assistant camera: Daniel Foeldes
Steadicam operator: Sven Joukes
First assistant director: Sebastian Vrijdaghs
Costume designer: Andrea De Keyzer
Editor & FX supervisor: Charles De Meyer
Colorist: Ducan Russel & Maximiliaan Dierickx
Gaffer: Florent Bagard
Electricians: Angel Paredes & Vincent Nouguier
Key grip: Gilles Lacroix & Unai Duhalde
Grip: Aitz Amilibia & Andde Carrere
Make up artist: Daphn√© Durieux
Location manager: Jean Louis Decoster
Production assistant: Elodie Marchal
Monitoring engineer; Sebastien Roblin
Additional grooming: Paolo De Luca
On-set Photography; Anne Degu√©h√©gny & Gabrielle Duplantier
Catering; Mirelen & Aize Duhalde
Hdri photography: Olivier Sipesaque
 
Cast:
Guard: Steve Driesen
Dealer: John-John Mossoux
 
Shapeshifter (in order of appearance)
Old man: Marcel Vandericken
Young girl: Lou Lambrecht
Man in hoodie: Edson Anibal
Bourgeois Woman: Julie Basecq
Young boy: Sacha Pirlet
Man in suit: Mohit Mathur
Rave girl: Yipoon Chiem
Biker: Olivier Sipesaque

Lyrics:
Mortal, spawn on the altar 
Caught in the heart of the blaze 
The primal fear of disappearing 
Becoming a ghost in the void 
Death

Give a price, put a name 
None of it real in this matter 
Wandering, distracting, 
Wishing the life of another self

We were born for one thing
Tame the greatest fear of all
We were born for one thing
Born to face the greatest fear of all

We‚Äôre all drawn into ourselves
In a collective coma
Remember gazing up for answers But now we‚Äôre staring down

All is blur in the maze we put an end to all

We were born for one thing
Tame the greatest fear of all
We were born for one thing
Born to face the greatest fear of all

We‚Äôre no one 
United
When we‚Äôre gone

Music and Lyrics by Gojira
Produced by Joe Duplantier
Mixed by Andy Wallace

snippet.title: CHIACCHIERE DI CARNEVALE LEGGERE E FRIABILI ūüé≠
snippet.description:
Salve a tutti oggi ti propongo le mie chiacchiere di Carnevale leggere, non unte, friabili e super bollose! Dalle mie parti in Toscana le chiamiamo "Cenci". 
Spero che la ricetta ti piaccia, a presto! ūüôŹ
ūüĆļBLOGGER: https://lericettediterroresplendore.blogspot.com/2021/02/chiacchiere-di-carnevale-leggere-e.html
ūüĆļFACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/LeRicetteDiTerroreSplendore/
ūüĆļINSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/lericettediterroresplendore/
ūüĆļGRUPPO FACEBOOK "CUCINO DUNQUE SONO": https://www.facebook.com/groups/163961603801613/
ūüĆļTWITTER: https://twitter.com/carletticarla67

Ingredienti: 
-325 g di farina 00
-50 g di zucchero
-50 g di latte
-50 g di burro fuso
-2 uova medie 
-scorza di limone non trattato
-1 cucchiaino di estratto di vaniglia
-1 pizzico di sale 
-olio di semi per friggere
-zucchero a velo per spolverizzare 


#lericettediterroresplendore #chiacchieredicarnevale #chiacchiere #cencidicarnevale #frappe #crostoli #bugiedicarnevale #eating #carnevale #ricettadolce #cooking #cucina

snippet.title: Finalmente ALTAMURA - Ep. 14
snippet.description:
17.08.2020
Salutiamo Martina Franca alla volta di Altamura, cittadina architettonicamente affascinante e incredibile dal punto di vista della tradizione culinaria.
Vi portiamo in giro con noi a scoprire le tipicit√† locali: colazione assaggiando zizze delle monache e rafaioli, pranzo con focaccia con pomodorini e cena con salsiccia a punta di coltello tipica locale (e un richiamino di burrata!).
Ci √® piaciuto mangiare da:
- Pasticceria Adua, via Paisiello 60, Martina Franca (TA)
- Caseificio Dicecca, via Bari 26, Altamura (BA)
- Pasticceria Reale, via Abetone 13A, Altamura (BA)
- Antico Forno Santa Chiara, via Luca Martucci 10, Altamura (BA)
- Macelleria Dileo Pasquale, via Martiri 1799 97, Altamura (BA)
- Caseificio Stella Dicecca, piazza Giacomo Matteotti 11, Altamura (BA)
Abbiamo dormito da:
- B&B Santa Chiara, via Francesco Tota, Altamura (BA)

snippet.title: Cortina 2021 - Il sorvolo delle Frecce Tricolori sulle Dolomiti

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Monday, February 15 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 10:59 p.m. EST, or 3:59 UTC on February 16.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously flew on five missions: Dragon‚Äôs 19th and 20th commercial resupply missions to the International Space Station, a Starlink mission, the SAOCOM 1B mission, and the NROL-108 mission. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean.

snippet.title: INTER-LAZIO 3-1 post match* TRAMONTANA: QUANDO L'INTER VINCE SEMBRA SEMPRE PER DEMERITO DEGLI ALTRI.
snippet.description:
#inter #FORZAINTER #interlazio

Inter-Lazio 3-1, Lukaku √® un ciclone: i nerazzurri volano in testa alla classifica.
Lukaku scaglia nella porta laziale la rete del raddoppio.
La doppietta dell'attaccante belga (che arriva a 300 gol in carriera) e la rete di Lautaro Martinez valgono il sorpasso sul Milan proprio ad una settimana dal derby. Per i biancocelesti inutile sigillo di Milinkovic (con deviazione decisiva di Escalante) e primo ko in campionato nel 2021

Da Diretta Stadio su 7 Gold

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing CRASH COURSE- 1 DAY LEFT!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

Title: Raule
Singer: Jassa Dhillon ft. Gurlez Akhtar
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: B Sanj
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Gagan Shahi
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions

Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre

Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic‚Äč

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta‚Äč
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial‚Äč
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu‚Äč
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

snippet.title: Biko | Peter Gabriel | Playing For Change | Song Around The World
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou can blow out a candle, but you can't blow out a fire. Once the flames begin to catch, the wind will blow it higher.‚ÄĚ ‚Äď Peter Gabriel, Biko

In honor of Black History Month, we are proud to bring the message of Peter Gabriel‚Äôs ‚ÄúBiko‚ÄĚ back to the forefront, 40 years after its initial release. Inspired by the death of anti-apartheid activist Steve Biko while in police custody, this song‚Äôs relevance still holds true with the unfortunate police brutality that continues to take place in the USA, Nigeria and many places around the world. More than 25 musicians from seven countries join Gabriel for this global rendition to share a message of unity, peace, and hope, including Beninese vocalist and activist¬†Ang√©lique¬†Kidjo, Silkroad‚Äôs Yo-Yo Ma, and bass legend¬†Meshell¬†Ndegeocello.

The eyes of the world are watching‚Ä¶ Let each of us lead with love and let that love ripple throughout the universe.

Produced by Sebastian Robertson and Mark Johnson

MORE FROM PETER GABRIEL

https://www.facebook.com/PeterGabriel/

https://twitter.com/playing4change

https://playingforchange.com


SPECIAL THANKS TO OUR PARTNERS IN MAKING CHANGE:
Corning¬ģ Gorilla¬ģ Glass launched in 2007.  Since its inception, Gorilla Glass has become the glass of choice for mobile consumer electronics manufacturers around the globe. The patented, durable glass technology has been designed into more than 8 billion consumer electronic devices by more than 45 major OEMs. Formed through Corning‚Äôs proprietary fusion draw process and strengthened through an ion-exchange process, Corning Gorilla Glass continues to deliver industry-leading performance and durability with a thin, pristine surface that is ideal for the mobile consumer electronics industry as well as automotive applications.

Gibson, the world‚Äôs most iconic guitar brand, has shaped the sounds of generations of musicians and music lovers across genres for more than 100 years. Founded in 1894 and headquartered in Nashville, TN, with a premiere acoustic facility in Bozeman, MT, Gibson Brands has a legacy of world-class craftsmanship, legendary music partnerships, and progressive product evolution that is unrivaled among musical instrument companies. The Gibson Brands portfolio includes Gibson, the number one guitar brand, as well as many of the most beloved and recognizable music brands, including Epiphone, Kramer, Steinberger, and the Gibson Pro Audio Division, KRK Music. Gibson Brands is dedicated to quality, innovation, and sound excellence so that music lovers for generations to come will continue to experience music shaped by Gibson Brands. Learn more at https://Gibson.com

Audio-Technica‚ÄĒAudio pioneer in high-performance sound design
Established in 1962, Audio-Technica is a worldwide group of companies devoted to the design, manufacture, marketing and distribution of problem-solving audio equipment. Initially known for state-of-the-art phonograph cartridges, A-T now creates high-performance microphones, headphones, wireless systems, mixers and electronic products for home and professional use. For more information visit: https://www.audio-technica.com

Playing For Change (PFC) is a movement created to inspire and connect the world through music, born from the shared belief that music has the power to break down boundaries and overcome distances between people. The primary focus of PFC is to record and film musicians performing in their natural environments and combine their talents and cultural power in innovative videos called Songs Around The World. Creating these videos motivated PFC to form the Playing For Change Band‚ÄĒa tangible, traveling representation of its mission, featuring musicians met along their journey; and establish the Playing For Change Foundation‚ÄĒa separate 501(c)3 nonprofit organization dedicated to supporting music programs for children around the world. Through these efforts, Playing For Change aims to create hope and inspiration for the future of our planet.

To learn more about the work of the PFC Foundation, visit http://www.playingforchange.org
